title: Ambience V2
description: Change the colors of the environment
body:
Ambience V2!

This mod changes the color of the environment, such as the sky, foliage (plants), lava, fire, water, and clouds. --- ### Information: **Config** General Settings: - Enable Mod - Override in game time Sky Settings: - Override overworld, nether & end sky color - Overworld sky gradient - Brightness & height controller for the gradient Clouds, Water, Lava & Fire Settings: - Override color Foliage Settings: - Override leaves, grass block, short grass & tall grass color ### Examples

Sky - Gradient Enabled
Time: 18,000
Overworld Sky Color Value: #C600FF
Overworld Sky Gradient Color Value: White

Lava
Lava Color Value: #C600FF

Fire
Fire Color Value: #64E1FF

Water
Water Color Value: #C600FF

Other example include: Grass Block/Grass & Leaves. See Gallery.

--- **Credits** - Mod: Walksy
